name: MikroTik QuickMOUNT extra
title: MikroTik QuickMOUNT extra
short_description: The quickMOUNT extra is an advanced wall mount adapter for large point to point and sector antennas
description: The quickMOUNT extra is an advanced wall mount adapter for large point to point and sector antennas

detailed_description.heading: Detailed description
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik QuickMOUNT Extra (QME) is a robust and versatile wall-mount adapter specifically designed for large point-to-point and sector antennas. It provides flexible installation options, allowing you to mount antennas directly on a wall or use the adapter to convert a large-diameter pole to a small-size antenna mounting clip, ensuring a secure and stable fit. The QuickMOUNT Extra supports precise antenna adjustment with a rotation range of up to 190°, enabling optimal alignment for maximum signal quality and link stability. It is compatible with MikroTik’s long-range heavy antennas, including the 30dBi parabolic dish mANT 30 and the 19dBi sector mANT 19s, making it suitable for demanding wireless deployments. Constructed from durable reinforced plastic, the adapter is built to withstand both indoor and outdoor environments. Ideal for wireless ISPs, network installers, and advanced home users, the QuickMOUNT Extra provides a reliable, cost-effective, and professional solution for mounting large antennas in offices, industrial sites, remote locations, or residential areas.
